name: Website Lead → Sheet (with priority tag)
description: When a customer fills out your website contact form, capture them as a lead in a Google Sheet — automatically labelled HOT / WARM / COLD based on the source channel. Replaces the manual copy-paste-from-email workflow most MSMEs do today.

variables.label: Google Sheet ID
variables.description: Sheet the lead rows go into.

variables.label: Tab name
variables.description: Header row should be: Captured At, Name, Email, Phone, Source, Priority, Notes
